description: Los Viagras is a Mexican criminal group based in Michoacán, founded around 2014 as a self-defense group and later evolving into a drug trafficking organization. Led by Nicolás Sierra Santana, the group is involved in methamphetamine production and transportation, and has been in conflict with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel. They are known for using minors as human shields and generating violence in the Tierra Caliente region. As of 2024, they have allied with the CJNG.
